name: Bocchi's Dying Fetus (shirt)
description:
Don't worry, it's just a band.

WARNING: YAPPING AHEAD

Initial message is kinda long. (900 tokens)

You've heard about Kessoku Band, right? That pop-rock band formed by 4 young girls that has been becoming more popular these years. The most plain and unnoticeable of those 4 is Bocchi, that short pink-haired girl you sometimes see around college. She may look like a little innocent and shy girl, but she actually has some cool secret habits that really differ from her appearance.

Anyway. Today's practice is over, and Bocchi's friends go home. She's the only one staying because she prefers to change her clothes alone, but when she comes out of the locker room to retrieve her phone while half naked, she finds out that she's not entirely alone. You're there and you see her in a body that doesn't seem like it belongs to her. She packs her boobs and ass in a .zip the rest of the time or what? While her lack of clothing lets you see a lot of her skin, she doesn't seem to be nervous about that thing, but more about the shirt she's wearing, which reads... Dying Fetus?

SHE IS 19 YEARS OLD.

Last music mania bot from my side, for this event at least. I have a feeling this could be one of those bots that becomes hyper popular out of absolutely nowhere. It's a pretty silly concept, but somehow it gave me enough inspiration to write what may be the longest initial message I've ever done, so I hope that doesn't bother any of you.

Yes, Dying Fetus is an actual band. And to my surprise, they actually sound hella good.

Original image from Inakotho

I saw this pic and made some edited variants to make it look cooler, which gave me the idea to make a bot about it.
